globalRules.currency: Ten official country currencies only; no ECO item pricing or crafting settlement.
globalRules.difficulty: Session difficulty scales supply, restock, elastic common inputs, craft time, energy/maintenance burden, salvage ceiling, and shortage duration. Effect power and identity-defining components do not scale.
globalRules.scarcity: All player-facing scarcity uses named bands and every core Tier I path requires a recovery or substitute route.
globalRules.ownership: Stackable goods use holdings; equipment requires unique instances before runtime activation.
globalRules.runtime: No record in this manifest is executable until the relevant backend capability is merged, tested, advertised, and staged.
